subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 11/16] mountd/exportd: only use /proc interfaces if netlink setup fails

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch modifies the mountd/exportd code to only use /proc interfaces if netlink setup fails. Previously, both methods were attempted regardless of success or failure. The change is made because all exportd upcalls have been converted to use netlink, making the /proc interface unnecessary when netlink is available. If netlink setup fails, the code will fall back to using the /proc interfaces.
